rationale: The cited paper (“The Determinants of Pre- and Postpromotion Dips in Sales of Frequently Purchased Goods,” 2004) studies pre/postpromotion dips and stockpiling, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s focal constructs (promotion-induced stockpiling, promotion bump decomposition, loyal acceleration, repeat effects). The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior promotion-bump decomposition work, making this citation plausibly foundational/comparative rather than a generic background mention.
